chunks.text: Page 1 of 2 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1627 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 19-05-2022 Mr. Manzoor Hussain Halepoto, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General a/w Talib Hussain Khokhar, Focal Person, Irrigation East Division, Khairpur and Ali Nawaz Bhatti, Assistant Engineer, Irrigation Khairpur Sub-Division, Khairpur <><><><>..<><><><> Through this Petition, the Petitioners have sought the following relief(s);- (a) That this Honourable Court may graciously be pleased to declare the act and action of the respondents for not sanctioning the new watercourse from newly constructed Shakh / Minor crossed from the lands of petitioners as illegal, and unlawful. (b) That this Honourable Court may further be pleased to direct the respondents to sanction new watercourse from the newly constructed Shaheed Benazir Supplementary Minor crossed from the lands of petitioners; to enable them to irrigate their lands smoothly without any hindrance, as the Petitioners have no any other alternate to irrigate their lands except above Minor /Shakh. (c) To award any other equitable relief, which this Honourable Court deems fit and proper under the circumstances of the case. (d) To award the costs of the Petition. (C.P No.D-1627/2021) Page 2 of 2 Notice was ordered and as per statement of Respondents 1 to 4, the Petitioners have never approached for sanction of any new watercourse to their lands from supplementary channel. In view of such position, the Petition is disposed of by directing the Petitioners to approach the concerned Respondents for sanction of a new watercourse with proper documentation, whereas, the Respondents shall decide the request of the Petitioners in accordance with law.

Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General a/w Talib Hussain Khokhar, Focal Person, Irrigation East Division, Khairpur and Ali Nawaz Bhatti, Assistant Engineer, Irrigation Khairpur Sub-Division, Khairpur <><><><>..<><><><> Through this Petition, the Petitioners have sought the following relief(s);- (a) That this Honourable Court may graciously be pleased to declare the act and action of the respondents for not sanctioning the new watercourse from newly constructed Shakh / Minor crossed from the lands of petitioners as illegal, and unlawful. (b) That this Honourable Court may further be pleased to direct the respondents to sanction new watercourse from the newly constructed Shaheed Benazir Supplementary Minor crossed from the lands of petitioners; to enable them to irrigate their lands smoothly without any hindrance, as the Petitioners have no any other alternate to irrigate their lands except above Minor /Shakh. (c) To award any other equitable relief, which this Honourable Court deems fit and proper under the circumstances of the case. (d) To award the costs of the Petition. (C.P No.D-1627/2021) Page 2 of 2 Notice was ordered and as per statement of Respondents 1 to 4, the Petitioners have never approached for sanction of any new watercourse to their lands from supplementary channel. In view of such position, the Petition is disposed of by directing the Petitioners to approach the concerned Respondents for sanction of a new watercourse with proper documentation, whereas, the Respondents shall decide the request of the Petitioners in accordance with law. Judge Judge ARBROHI
